symptom: No prior local project memory files existed.
resolution: Created source-of-truth files before architecture handoff.

symptom: pip reported that browser-use requires openai==2.16.0 while langchain-openai installed openai 2.36.0.
cause: Dependencies were installed into the shared local Python environment for smoke verification.
resolution: InfraAgent backend smoke checks passed; use a project virtual environment on the AMD VM.
prevention: Create and activate a dedicated venv before installing requirements.txt in future runs.
